title: Prove exact pool and category actuals across corrections
preconditions: Generators can create exact transaction, refund, reversal, transfer, supersession, category, pool, instrument, cardholder, and reconciliation histories.
steps: Generate and shrink histories; query all-up, pool, category, and pool-by-category projections before and after corrections and reconciliation.
expected: All grouped minor-unit sums equal all-up totals; transfers contribute zero spend; refunds follow explicit current dimensions; reconciliation alone never changes finance totals; unknown and unassigned buckets lose no transaction.
